Chinese: 你是不是出差忘记关窗？昨天的风很大。
Pinyin: Nǐ shì bù shì chū chāi wàng jì guān chuāng? Zuó tiān de fēng hěn dà.
English: Did you forget to close the window when you went on your business trip? The wind was very strong yesterday.

Chinese: 哎呀，糟糕！我可能忘记关了。
Pinyin: Āi yā, zāo gāo! Wǒ kě néng wàng jì guān le.
English: Oh no! I might have forgotten to close it.

Chinese: 以后出门一定要关好窗口。
Pinyin: Yǐ hòu chū mén yí dìng yào guān hǎo chuāng kǒu.
English: In the future, you must make sure the windows are closed properly before going out.

Chinese: 惨了，你看，花瓶也跌碎了。
Pinyin: Cǎn le, nǐ kàn, huā píng yě diē suì le.
English: Oh no, look, the vase also fell and broke.

Pinyin: Xiǎo xīn, bù yào diē dǎo
English: Be careful, don’t fall down / Watch out, don’t slip and fall

Pinyin: Shì Dàwèi sòng gěi nǐ de nà ge ma?
English: Is it the one David gave you?

Chinese: 是啦，是他给我的生日礼物。
Pinyin: Shì la, shì tā gěi wǒ de shēng rì lǐ wù.
English: Yeah, it was a birthday gift from him.

Pinyin: Āi yō, tài kě xī liao.
Zāo gāo, wǒ men chí dào le!

Chinese: 糟糕，我的电话没有电了。
Pinyin: Zāo gāo, wǒ de diàn huà méi yǒu diàn le.
English: Oh no, my phone is out of battery.

Chinese: 糟糕，我忘记带我的锁匙了。
Pinyin: Zāo gāo, wǒ wàng jì dài wǒ de suǒ shi le.
English: Oh no, I forgot to bring my keys.

Pinyin: Cǎn liao lo, wǒ men chí dào le!
